title: ACTREC Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
short_info: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Project Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website of ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ACTREC Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Project Coordinator at the Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Coordinator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc/ B.Pharm degree with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 25 years and 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 45,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for ACTREC Project Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.
